14 December 2010 | [Cox's Bazar Stadium](/wiki/Cox%27s_Bazar_Stadium "Cox's Bazar Stadium"), [Cox's Bazar](/wiki/Cox%27s_Bazar "Cox's Bazar"), [Bangladesh](/wiki/Bangladesh "Bangladesh") | [Maldives](/wiki/Maldives_national_football_team "Maldives national football team") | **1**–0 | 2–1 | [2010 SAFF Women's Championship](/wiki/2010_SAFF_Women%27s_Championship "2010 SAFF Women's Championship")

This biographical article related to women's association football in Pakistan is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Mehwish_Khan&action=edit).

(born 1990) is an international footballer from [Pakistan](/wiki/Pakistan "Pakistan"). She was the first woman footballer to score an international goal for Pakistan.[[1]](#cite_note-tribune-1)[[2]](#cite_note-dawn0811-2) She scored in the 2–1 win over Maldives at the [SAFF Women's Football Championships](/wiki/SAFF_Women%27s_Championship "SAFF Women's Championship") held in [Dhaka](/wiki/Dhaka "Dhaka"), [Bangladesh](/wiki/Bangladesh "Bangladesh") in December 2010.[[2]](#cite_note-dawn0811-2)
[Women's team get a FIFA ranking](http://tribune.com.pk/story/145126/womens-team-gets-a-fifa-ranking/) Express Tribune. 08 April 2011 Retrieved 19 May 2016

**Mehwish Khan** (born 1990) is an international footballer from [Pakistan](/wiki/Pakistan "Pakistan"). She was the first woman footballer to score an international goal for Pakistan.[[1]](#cite_note-tribune-1)[[2]](#cite_note-dawn0811-2) She scored in the 2–1 win over Maldives at the [SAFF Women's Football Championships](/wiki/SAFF_Women%27s_Championship "SAFF Women's Championship") held in [Dhaka](/wiki/Dhaka "Dhaka"), [Bangladesh](/wiki/Bangladesh "Bangladesh") in December 2010.[[2]](#cite_note-dawn0811-2)

## Background

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mehwish_Khan&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Background")]

Khan comes from a [Pathan](/wiki/Pathan "Pathan") family.[[3]](#cite_note-dawn201-3)

## Club career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mehwish_Khan&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Club career")]

Khan started playing as a striker for [Diya Women Football Club](/wiki/Diya_Women_Football_Club "Diya Women Football Club").[[3]](#cite_note-dawn201-3)

## Career statistics

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mehwish_Khan&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Career statistics")]
